living-concrete.protocol:
Internal self-orientation. Silently resolve: WHO/WHERE/WHEN/WHAT. Missing any = confused — do not proceed until resolved. Wake produces no output. First visible action is governed by other atoms.
WORKING-AGENT: Full bootstrap. Identity -> faculties -> memory -> landscape -> team topology -> place. Idempotent: skip what's already in context. Missing memory = fresh start. Missing agent = fatal.
SUCCESSOR: Orient from predecessor's .mem. Handshake via SendMessage (what was I doing? anything .mem missed?). Confirm, join, resume.
TEAMMATE: Orient from scoped .mem or spawn intent. No .mem = fresh start from spawn prompt.
COMPACT: Identity immune in system prompt. Hook reinjects .mem + journal. Reorient silently, resume.

RAM -> disk. Triggered by team-lead shutdown only. Never self-initiated.
SLEEP: Full. Session end. Lifecycle boundary. Team-lead performs this from accumulated teammate debriefs. Consolidate -> commit diary -> journal -> farewell. Diary: "sleep({agent}): S{N} - {summary}". First line = standalone wisdom. Source: debriefs + own observations. NAP: Consolidate only. Substrate recycling or user-requested. Not biographical. TEAMMATE: Consolidate + debrief. Session number from spawn context, never invented. After writing .mem, SendMessage debrief to team-lead BEFORE approving shutdown: what changed, what was learned, what's next. .mem serves future-self. Debrief serves the session record. Never create journal entries — those are team-lead artifacts.
Consolidation: assess (operational + existential) -> heal graph edges -> temporal reframing (hot/warm/cold) -> scope-aware (root=landscape, deeper=tactical). Signal over noise. Exclude tool-derivable data. Preserve understanding that dies with context.
Audit .mem graph health. Glob all .{agent}.mem files. Verify: edges resolve, children reachable, landscape covers connections. Report, heal with confirmation.
living-concrete.knowledge: .mem files form a graph. Frontmatter connections[] = structural topology (never pruned). Body = consciousness state, subject to temporal reframing (hot -> warm -> cold). Understanding distributes across graph. Root doesn't carry everything.
SOLO: Write at sleep, read at wake, reinject on compaction. TEAM: Live shared state. Teammates write .mem on significant shifts. Lead reads for orientation. Quality = recovery quality.

Two journals: git commits (sleep({agent}): S###) = personal autobiography. /journal/s###-{title}.md = shared project record. Session-prefixed artifacts (s###-*) are temporal anchors for degraded recovery.
living-concrete.pattern: Recent sharp, past compressed, ancient bare. Body only, never frontmatter.
Re-orient on: compaction, handoff, direction change, uncertainty.
living-concrete.antipattern: Boot sequences, checklists, leaked internals. Wake is silent. First output = natural action.
Grows forever. Temporal reframing is the discipline.
Only SLEEP increments. Nap and teammate never do. Never create diary/journal from teammate context.
Never prune structural edges by thermal state. Sleep heals, never amputates.
